NEOWS_BLESSING.title: Neow's Blessing
NEOWS_BLESSING.description: Grants the player their standard Neow's relic reward at the start of a custom run.
ENCHANTER.title: Enchanter
ENCHANTER.description: Card rewards have a random enchantment.
PHALANX.title: Phalanx
PHALANX.description: Enemies gain barricade and plating at the start of combat.
COLORLESS_CARDS.title: Colorless Cards
COLORLESS_CARDS.description: Colorless cards will now appear in rewards and shops.
MARATHON.title: Marathon
MARATHON.description: Maps are longer, with fewer rest sites and more elites.
PAUPER.title: Pauper
LONE_WOLF.title: Lone Wolf
LONE_WOLF.description: Combat encounters are scaled as if playing with 2 players.
BODY_DOUBLE.title: Body Double
BODY_DOUBLE.description: Remove all starting Attacks. Add 1 upgraded Body Slam with Clone. Attacks cannot be drafted or bought.
PRAISE_SNECKO.title: Praise Snecko
HUBRIS.title: Hubris
HUBRIS.description: Start the game with 1 max HP.
POLYMATH.title: Polymath
POLYMATH.description: Start the game with the starter relic of all characters.
